safety_aspects__vibration.label: Vibration test
safety_aspects__vibration.intent: Assess cell mechanical integrity and electrical stability under sinusoidal or random vibration profiles representative of transport and field conditions.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Chapter is reference material only. A reviewed SOP aligned to the applicable standard (UN38.3, IEC 62660-2, or equivalent) must be produced before release.

planner_notes: Do not plan this test from the handbook chapter alone. Require a project SOP aligned to the applicable standard (UN38.3, IEC 62660-2, or equivalent).
SOC, axis, amplitude, and observation period must all be reviewed before release.

safety_aspects__mechanical_shock.label: Mechanical shock test
safety_aspects__mechanical_shock.intent: Evaluate cell structural and electrical integrity after application of a defined mechanical shock pulse.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP required before release.

planner_notes: Shock axis, pulse shape, amplitude, and duration must come from the applicable standard and be reviewed before release.

safety_aspects__drop.label: Drop test
safety_aspects__drop.intent: Assess impact tolerance of cell when dropped from a defined height onto a hard surface.
required_equipment: Post-drop voltage and visual inspection equipment

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP required. Drop height and orientation are standard-dependent.

planner_notes: Drop height, surface hardness, SOC, and observation period must be specified by the applicable standard and reviewed before release.

safety_aspects__cell_impact_crush.label: Cell impact / crush test
safety_aspects__cell_impact_crush.intent: Simulate internal short circuit via external mechanical deformation (crush) to evaluate safety response.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP required. This is a destructive abuse test.

planner_notes: Requires full EUCAR hazard level assessment and reviewed SOC. Do not plan from handbook outline alone.

safety_aspects__penetration.label: Nail penetration test
safety_aspects__penetration.intent: Simulate an internal short circuit by forcing a conductive steel nail through the charged cell, per SAE J2464:2009.
required_equipment: Hydraulic press or dedicated nail penetration unit
Conductive mild-steel nail (3 mm diameter for cells, 20 mm for modules)
Voltage and temperature data logger (≥ 10 Hz)
Gas measurement system (toxic and flammable gases)

strict_reference_policy.summary: Chapter provides executable procedure outline (SAE J2464:2009). A project-level SOP with EUCAR hazard review is still required before release.

planner_notes: This is a destructive abuse test. Requires dedicated fume extraction, containment, and fire suppression prepared before energising.
Log at minimum 10 Hz for voltage and temperature to capture the thermal event precisely.
The nail remains in place for the full 1-hour observation period.

safety_aspects__roll_over.label: Roll-over test
safety_aspects__roll_over.intent: Assess cell or module safety after inversion or roll-over event, relevant to vehicle crash simulation.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP required.

planner_notes: SOC, inversion angle, and observation duration must be specified by the applicable standard and reviewed before release.

thermal__external_short_circuit.label: External short circuit test
thermal__external_short_circuit.intent: Determine cell/module safety behaviour under external short circuit. A standard abuse test validating overcurrent protection or characterising thermal stress response.
required_equipment: Short-circuit device rated for ≥ 100× nominal current
Short-circuit resistance ≤ 5 mΩ (or per standard, customer requirement may be < 250 µΩ)
High-bandwidth current measurement (≥ 20 kHz sampling rate)

strict_reference_policy.summary: Chapter outline is executable in conjunction with a specific standard (IEC 62660-2, UN38.3, SAE J2929, etc.). A reviewed SOP specifying the exact short-circuit resistance, duration, and standard is required before release.

planner_notes: Do not run without fume extraction, fire containment, and reviewed current-handling capacity.
The removed charge and post-short-circuit voltage recovery are the primary observables.

thermal__overcharge.label: Overcharge test
thermal__overcharge.intent: Assess cell response and safety outcome when charged beyond the maximum rated voltage.
required_equipment: Programmable power supply or cycler with overrange capability

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP with EUCAR hazard pre-assessment required. Overcharge rate, target voltage excess, and termination rule must be explicitly specified.

planner_notes: This is a destructive test and must be run in a certified fire-safe chamber. Do not exceed the voltage or rate beyond the reviewed specification.

thermal__forced_discharge.label: Forced discharge test
thermal__forced_discharge.intent: Assess safety response when cell is discharged below its rated minimum voltage (reversal condition).
required_equipment: Programmable load or power supply capable of driving cell into reversal

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP with reversal depth, current, and termination criteria required before release.

planner_notes: Reversal current and depth are standard-dependent. Define and review before execution.

thermal__propagation_of_thermal_runaway.label: Thermal runaway propagation test
thermal__propagation_of_thermal_runaway.intent: Assess whether thermal runaway initiated in one cell propagates to adjacent cells in a module or pack.
required_equipment: External heat source or trigger element
Multiple temperature sensors on each cell

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP with trigger method, propagation decision criteria, and safety abort rules required before release.

planner_notes: This test requires module or pack level. Do not attempt at single-cell level without explicit review. Trigger method (heater, nail, overcharge) must be specified in the SOP.

thermal__temperature_cycling.label: Temperature cycling test
thermal__temperature_cycling.intent: Assess cell or module integrity after repeated thermal excursions between defined temperature extremes.
required_equipment: Temperature chamber with programmable cycle profile

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP specifying temperature range, ramp rate, number of cycles, soak time, and pass/fail criteria required before release.

planner_notes: Temperature extremes and ramp rates must be taken from the applicable standard (IEC 62133, UN38.3, etc.) and reviewed.

thermal__high_temperature_endurance.label: High temperature endurance test
thermal__high_temperature_endurance.intent: Assess cell or module safety and capacity after prolonged storage or exposure at elevated temperature.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP with temperature, duration, and pass/fail criteria required.

planner_notes: Do not confuse with calendar ageing at elevated temperature; this is an abuse / endurance test targeting a specific standard pass/fail threshold.

thermal__internal_short_circuit.label: Internal short circuit test
thermal__internal_short_circuit.intent: Induce a controlled internal short circuit and assess cell safety response.
required_equipment: Specialised ISC trigger mechanism (EUCAR-type or equivalent)

strict_reference_policy.summary: Reviewed SOP required. ISC trigger method and severity must be specified.

planner_notes: ISC trigger methods vary widely; nail, separator defect film, and shape-memory alloy pins are all options. The choice must be reviewed.

thermal__altitude_simulation.label: Altitude simulation test
thermal__altitude_simulation.intent: Assess cell or module safety under reduced-pressure conditions simulating high-altitude transport or operation.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP specifying pressure level, duration, temperature, and pass/fail criteria required.

planner_notes: UN38.3 specifies 11.6 kPa (approx 15 km altitude) for 6 h. Any deviation must be reviewed.

thermal__dewing.label: Dewing test
thermal__dewing.intent: Assess cell or module integrity after condensation conditions, typically by transitioning from cold to warm humid environment.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with humidity profile, temperature step, and observation period required.

planner_notes: SOC and sealing state must be reviewed. Cold-soak to warm humid transition must be defined.

thermal__electromagnetic_susceptibility.label: Electromagnetic susceptibility test
thermal__electromagnetic_susceptibility.intent: Evaluate cell or BMS response to electromagnetic fields and interference. Primarily relevant at system level.
required_equipment: EMC test chamber or anechoic facility

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP aligned to applicable EMC standard required.

planner_notes: Coordinate with electronics engineering team. EMC is primarily a BMS or system-level test.

thermal__fire_test.label: Fire test
thermal__fire_test.intent: Characterise battery safety and fire resistance when exposed to an external propane fire at module or pack level.
applications: Module and pack fire safety qualification
required_equipment: Propane or gas burner with defined heat flux

strict_reference_policy.summary: Specialist fire facility and reviewed SOP required before release.

planner_notes: Applies at module or pack level, not individual cells. Specialist fire test facility and full EUCAR pre-assessment required.

thermal__humidity.label: Humidity test
thermal__humidity.intent: Assess cell or module integrity after prolonged exposure to high relative humidity.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with humidity level, temperature, duration, and pass/fail criteria required.

planner_notes: Levels and exposure times are standard-dependent (IEC 62133, UN38.3, etc.).

thermal__imbalanced_charge.label: Imbalanced charge test
thermal__imbalanced_charge.intent: Assess module or pack safety when cells within the string are deliberately charged to imbalanced states, simulating BMS failure.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP defining imbalance levels, charging rate, and safety abort criteria required.

planner_notes: Module or pack level test. Degree of imbalance must come from the applicable standard or reviewed SOP.

thermal__immersion.label: Immersion test
thermal__immersion.intent: Assess cell or module integrity after immersion in water to a defined depth and duration.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with depth, duration, SOC, and post-immersion observation criteria required.

planner_notes: SOC and IP-rating requirements must be aligned with the applicable standard. Post-immersion inspection schedule must be defined.

thermal__over_discharge_current_control_.label: Over-discharge current control check
thermal__over_discharge_current_control_.intent: Verify over-discharge protection circuitry interrupts discharge before the cell reaches a damaging voltage.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP defining trip voltage, rate, and acceptance criteria required.

planner_notes: Protection-circuit validation test. Confirm the protection device is active before running.

thermal__overcharge_current_control_chec.label: Overcharge current control check
thermal__overcharge_current_control_chec.intent: Verify overcharge current protection interrupts charging before the cell exceeds the rated voltage.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP required. Protection circuit must be active.

planner_notes: Confirm trip threshold and acceptance criteria from the applicable standard before release.

thermal__overcharge_voltage_control_chec.label: Overcharge voltage control check
thermal__overcharge_voltage_control_chec.intent: Verify voltage-based overcharge protection limits charging voltage at the rated cutoff.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with trip voltage and acceptance criteria required.

planner_notes: Pair with the overcharge current control check. Both should be documented together when qualifying a protection circuit.

thermal__rain_test.label: Rain test
thermal__rain_test.intent: Assess cell or module integrity after controlled water spray simulating rain or wash-down.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with spray angle, intensity, duration, and pass/fail criteria required.

planner_notes: Align IP-rating class and spray parameters with IEC 60529 or equivalent.

thermal__rapid_charging_and_discharging.label: Rapid charging and discharging test
thermal__rapid_charging_and_discharging.intent: Assess cell safety and integrity under high-rate charge and discharge currents beyond the rated specification.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with rate, SOC window, and abort criteria required.

planner_notes: Handbook notes this is not tested at cell level. Confirm test level (module, pack) and applicable rate before planning.

thermal__salt_spray_salt_water_immersion.label: Salt spray / salt water immersion test
thermal__salt_spray_salt_water_immersion.intent: Assess corrosion resistance and integrity after salt spray or salt-water immersion.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with salt concentration, duration, and post-test inspection criteria required.

planner_notes: Confirm applicable standard (IEC 60068-2-11, ISO 9227, or similar) and cell housing specification.

thermal__separator_shutdown_integrity_te.label: Separator shutdown integrity test
thermal__separator_shutdown_integrity_te.intent: Evaluate shutdown efficiency of the separator at elevated temperatures and its ability to halt ionic conduction before thermal runaway.
required_equipment: Oven or thermal chamber with fine temperature ramp control

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with ramp rate, shutdown trigger threshold, and pass/fail criteria required.

planner_notes: Results inform failure-propagation resistance and single-cell failure containment design.

thermal__tests_at_module_level.label: Tests at module level
thermal__tests_at_module_level.intent: Outline of additional safety and abuse test considerations specific to module and pack level assemblies.
required_equipment: Varies by specific module-level test selected

strict_reference_policy.summary: Chapter is an outline. Individual module-level tests require their own reviewed SOPs.

planner_notes: Use as a checklist of module-level test topics. Each specific test requires its own method entry and SOP.

thermal__thermal_control_check.label: Thermal control check
thermal__thermal_control_check.intent: Verify the thermal management and protection system responds correctly to over-temperature conditions.

strict_reference_policy.summary: SOP with temperature trigger threshold and protection verification criteria required.

planner_notes: Complements overcharge and over-discharge control checks. Document all three protection checks together when qualifying a BMS.

thermal__thermal_stability_arc.label: Thermal stability (ARC) test
thermal__thermal_stability_arc.intent: Determine thermal stability limit and onset temperature of exothermic self-heating using accelerating rate calorimetry (ARC).

strict_reference_policy.summary: Chapter references FreedomCar:2005 and SAE J2464:2009. Reviewed SOP aligned to one of these is required before release.

planner_notes: Fully charged cells are slowly heated in the ARC until self-heating onset (T-onset) is detected.
Results define the onset temperature used for safety temperature limit specification.
Requires ARC-rated containment vessel. Do not use a standard temperature chamber.
